'''Ekh'm Val''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] who searched for and found the living [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]]. When he returned to [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]], he was [[Death/Legends|killed]] due to the fact that Jamaane feared Zonama Sekot, and refused to allow the knowledge of its presence in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] to become common knowledge among the Yuuzhan Vong.
